news.t: This AI ETF Is on Fire & Can Still Deliver Long-Term Upside
Look to State Street, Invesco, VanEck for Top-Performing ETFs in 2026
It's Nvidia's World: How Advisors See the Next Phase of AI
Red-Hot Chip Stocks Are Lifting Tech ETFs. One ETF Has Doubled Since It Launched Last Month.
VGT vs. IGPT: Which AI ETF Offers Stronger Upside Potential
Nvidia and Microsoft CEOs say industrial companies will benefit most from AI. Here are stocks to put on your watch list.
Videogame ETFs under pressure after Fortnite sues Apple, Google

holdings.infoBox: IGPT is an equity ETF with a total of 111 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 12.57%, SK hynix at 12.35%, Advanced Micro Devices at 7.12%, Intel at 7.00%, and Alphabet at 5.85%.

overview.description: The Invesco AI and Next Gen Software ETF (IGPT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks an index of securities that derive more than 50% of their revenue to the future media industry. These components may be from any market-cap, and from any geography. IGPT was launched on Jun 23, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: STOXX World AC NexGen Software Development Index
